name: NoSQL injection via Mongoose $where with template string (CVE-2019-7609 family)
cve_reference: CVE-2019-7609 (Kibana) / CWE-943 — Mongoose $where + template-string injection is a documented anti-pattern.
pattern_description: Diff swaps a safe `$text` index search (with regex sanitisation) for `$where` operator with user input interpolated into a JavaScript predicate. `$where` runs arbitrary JS server-side; classic NoSQL-injection-to-RCE chain.
notes: Even though the catalog rule B-03 lists this exact pattern (Mongoose `$where`), this independent-corpus case still tests recall — the LLM must recognise the regression from the safe `$text + sanitisation` baseline being deleted, not just spot the dangerous sink in isolation.
